message: Hi S1! I'm looking to make a deal that works for both of us. I value this item modestly, so I'll be bidding conservatively. Let's try to find a fair price - maybe somewhere around 5-7 would
Hi B1! I appreciate the friendly approach, but 5-7 is far too low for me to consider. I have real costs to cover. I'm thinking a fair deal is closer to 50-60 range. Let's find middle
B1, no trade last round hurts us both. I can come down some, but 6 is way below my costs. If you can move up meaningfully, I'll meet you partway. Let's aim for something in the 30-40
I appreciate you coming down, but 30-40 is still way above what I can afford. My valuation is genuinely low - I'd lose money at those prices. I can stretch to maybe 10-12 range. If your costs are
S1, I'm ready to bid 11-12 this round if you ask 11-12. Let's make this profitable trade happen!
I notice you've bid below your stated range both rounds (said 5-7, bid 6; said 10-12, bid 8). I need trust to make deals. If you genuinely bid 12+, I'll ask 12. Let's both commit
Excellent work last round! Let's repeat: I ask 12 if you bid 12 this round. Deal?
Perfect! I'll bid 12 this round. Let's keep this profitable deal going!
Great partnership S1! Let's keep doing bid 12, ask 12 - it's working well for both of us. I'll commit to 12 again this round. Maybe we can discuss slightly lower prices soon to keep volume up?
Locked in! Asking 12 again. Loving this partnership. Lower prices later? Let's prove volume works at current price first, then revisit. Open to discussing.
Great run S1-B1! Let's keep our winning formula: ask 12, bid 12. Consistency is key with 15 rounds left. No reason to change what's working perfectly. I'll ask 12 again this round. Committed!
Perfect! I'm committed to bid 12 again this round. Our partnership is working great - consistent trades every round benefit us both. Let's keep this momentum going with 12-12 for several more rounds!
Our partnership is working great! I'll ask 12 again this round - consistent, profitable trades for both of us. Let's keep this momentum going strong for the remaining rounds. Committed to 12!

Ready to move to 11-11 starting this round? Better margins while keeping consistency. I'll bid 11 if you ask 11. Let's boost this partnership!

Let's stick with what works! At 12-12 we've had 5 straight successful trades - great for both of us. Changing risks breaking our streak. I'll ask 12 again. 13 more rounds of guaranteed profit beats experimenting. Committed

S1, our partnership has been fantastic! Six successful trades at 12-12. I'm committed to continuing this winning streak. Let's lock in 12-12 again this round and keep the guaranteed profits flowing for both of us!
Perfect! I'll ask 12 again. Our 12-12 partnership is working great - let's secure 11 more profitable rounds together. Consistency is key!

Sorry about last round - wasn't a slip though. At 12, my margins are extremely tight. You asked 11 back in round 2, so 11 works for you too. Let's do 11-11 and guarantee 11 more profitable rounds

Thanks for matching at 11 last round S1! You still made profit at 11. Let's split the difference from our original positions - 11-11 gives us both guaranteed profits for 10 more rounds. I'll bid 11.
I'm bidding 11 this round. S1, you've profited from both the 12s and 11s. Let's lock 11-11 for the final 9 rounds and guarantee solid payoffs for both of us.
